race.comment: A BM66 Handicap is over 1200m for 50K, and barrier draws by this time of the day will be a big factor, especially on a heavy track. ARLINGTON ROW (11) missed the kick when knuckling over at the start last time out as the favourite at Mornington 17 days ago, and she never recovered. With a better beginning, she can make immediate amends. Follow your money. I'MATEEZ (6) showed a good turn of foot to win fresh up at Geelong just over 3 weeks ago. This is not much harder, and with the aid of a claim, he will carry a kilo less this time, so stick with him. TENNESSEE SONG (15) peaked on her run fresh up at Sandown-Lakeside nearly 3 weeks ago, and it is worth noting that Linda Meech has opted to stick with her. Each-way value. DOBKINS (14) is a local mare who has drawn the pole, which could either be a curse or a blessing. Follow the pattern of the day and react accordingly.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial - Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible
